title: aspidium angulatum
intro: Aspidium angulatum, also known as the angled spleenwort, is a species of fern that belongs to the Aspidium genus. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and act as an antiseptic. The health benefits of Aspidium angulatum include its potential to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, as well as its use in wound healing and as an antispasmodic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also dried and used in poultices or applied topically to affected areas.
